shirts.name: Boxy Camp Collar Shirt
shirts.description: A relaxed camp collar shirt crafted from breathable cotton-blend. Features a sharp flat collar, horizontal hem line, and high-contrast horn-textured buttons.

shirts.name: Washed Charcoal Tee
shirts.description: Heavily weighted 280GSM organic cotton jersey with dry hand-feel. Features a relaxed drop shoulder, thick double-needle collar, and vintage charcoal wash tone.

shirts.name: Bound Silk Tee
shirts.description: Impeccable silk-blend tee with clean bonded edge cuffs and hem. Seamless neckline finish creates a highly fluid editorial transition under suit jackets.

shirts.name: Horizontal Blue Striped Knit Polo
shirts.description: A luxurious short sleeve knit polo shirt adorned with grey and blue horizontal stripes. Features a sharp dark navy contrast collar and premium lightweight yarn construction.

shirts.name: Beige Striped Knit Polo
shirts.description: An elegant fine-knit polo shirt styled with subtle beige and tan stripes. Complemented by a solid taupe ribbed collar, presenting a highly sophisticated casual asset.

shirts.name: Olive Striped Knit Polo
shirts.description: Short sleeve fine-knit polo styled with elegant olive green and charcoal grey horizontal stripes. Complete with an olive ribbed collar and structured fit.

shirts.name: Two-Tone Grey Knit Polo
shirts.description: A striking premium knit polo shirt designed with a textured heather-grey body contrasted beautifully by a pristine white collar and modern flat placket.

shirts.name: Crochet Floral Patchwork Shirt
shirts.description: An editorial masterpiece constructed from handmade colorful crochet sunflower patches. Bold, breathable open-work design finished with a classic camp collar and real wood buttons.

shirts.name: Black Diamond Crochet Shirt
shirts.description: Artisanal short sleeve resort knit shirt featuring a rich black crochet body highlighted by a high-contrast white diamond-lattice open lace overlay.

shirts.name: Retro Grey Striped Polo
shirts.description: A premium heavy-weighted grey knit polo shirt featuring wide horizontal black stripes and delicate white accent lines. Infuses retro sport aesthetics into modern luxury.

shirts.name: Ribbed-Panel Black Polo
shirts.description: A sleek black luxury knit polo shirt defined by elegant vertical ribbed columns across the chest, creating high-fashion geometric texture depth.

shirts.name: Patterned Forest Green Polo
shirts.description: Rich forest green short sleeve knit polo boasting sophisticated cream horizontal geometric diamond patterns. Perfect blend of heritage golf feel and high street luxury.

shirts.name: Burgundy Ribbed Knit Polo
shirts.description: Luxury short sleeve polo shirt cut from super soft combed burgundy yarn. Standard ribbed texture throughout delivers highly tactile luxury comfort.

shirts.name: Ghana Federation Home Jersey
shirts.description: The official white home jersey for the Ghana national football team. Displays abstract high-contrast line graphical layout in pan-African red, yellow, and green, complete with the iconic bold black star at center.

shirts.name: Ghana Federation Away Jersey
shirts.description: The spectacular away jersey of the Ghana national team in rich yellow-gold. Styled with traditional woven fabric pattern textures and contrast green collar detailing, centering the Black Star.

shirts.name: Structured Linen Shirt
shirts.description: An uncompromising approach to summer shirting. Crafted from heavyweight, structured linen that maintains its architectural silhouette throughout the day. Features a hidden placket and zero visible stitching for extreme precision.

shirts.name: Oxford Poplin Shirt
shirts.description: Impeccably tailored white button-down shirt. Features crisp single-needle stitching, structured premium double-ply cotton poplin for a crisp fall, and clean geometric lines.

shirts.name: Denim Overshirt
shirts.description: Heavyweight raw denim overshirt styled with a stark, modern aesthetic. Silver polished button snaps and geometric double breast chest pockets provide high-contrast functionality.

shirts.name: Silk Chiffon Shirt
shirts.description: Pure flowing off-white silk chiffon shirt. Extremely smooth drape with translucent features, giving a dramatic airy look that transitions beautifully between environments.

shirts.name: Structured Shacket
shirts.description: A striking design hybrid between a structured jacket and a minimal shirt. Heavy architectural tailoring makes this charcoal beauty stand on its own feet.

shirts.name: Striped Poplin
shirts.description: Fine blue and white striped cotton poplin pattern with classic single-button cuffs. Crafted with high stitch density for maximum luxury and long-lasting editorial shape.

shirts.name: Ribbed Knit Singlet
shirts.description: Classic ribbed athletic singlet cut from heavy organic cotton-modal yarn. Deep scooped neckline, wide shoulder straps, and tailored side darts for a raw brutal shape.

shirts.name: Raw Asymmetric Vest
shirts.description: Architectural asymmetric knit singlet. Curved side slits and unfinished flat hems create a perfect layering tool with high visual rhythm.

shirts.name: Abstract Earth Resort Shirt
shirts.description: A stunning resort-style shirt featuring an abstract earthy botanical pattern printed on ultra-fluid, sustainable tencel fiber. Styled with a classic cuban camp collar and clean casual fit.

shirts.name: Portuguese Linen Button-Up
shirts.description: Naturally breathable long-sleeve shirt crafted from premium Portuguese linen yarn. Featuring structural chest pockets, a sharp collar stand, and mother-of-pearl buttons.

shirts.name: Minimal Canvas Overshirt
shirts.description: The ultimate layering piece. Crafted from heavyweight wash-treated utility canvas, featuring an elegant flat placket, large architectural flap pockets, and a clean square hem.

shirts.name: Signature Pinstripe Dress Shirt
shirts.description: An exquisite stripe shirt detailed with fine charcoal stripes. Expertly tailored in Italy with standard spread collar, curved hemline, and custom button cuffs.

shirts.name: Fine Pique Classic Polo
shirts.description: Crafted from soft comb-cotton pique weave. High tactile elegance, solid rib cuffs, and a dynamic two-button placket for complete stylistic versatility.
